name: My Strange Arrest
overview: An in-depth look at the people who were arrested for allegedly committing some of the weirdest, wildest and most bizarre crimes ever, digging beyond the headlines and the viral videos to take a look at the incidents and consequences, hearing the stories from the accused, the arresting officers and eye witnesses. These are bizarre crimes with real-life ramifications.

trailers.title: “My Strange Arrest” Premieres Wednesday, July 26 at 10pm ET/PT on A&E
